params.description: Animated Minis characters appear collecting items across four categories. Counting scenario begins.

beats.text: The Minis are collecting items! Help count what they found.

params.description: Student counts Minis and items across 3-4 categories. Game generates results in multiples of 10 ranging from 20 to 60. Values show clear differences for later comparison.

elements.description: Data collection game active. Minis characters collecting items. Student counting in progress.

params.description: Counting complete. Results revealed across all categories.

beats.text: You counted all the items the Minis found. That's a lot! Let's see how to show this data.

elements.description: Data collection game complete. Final counts displayed for Red Items, Blue Items, Yellow Items, and Green Items. All values are multiples of 10 in the 20-60 range.
